trigger: ArtifactAuditor found MISSING_FILE in a runtime_package artifact.
constraints: Both package.json and config/default-config.json are always required for runtime_package
package.json content must be valid JSON — not just a filename
Files must be nested under the 'files' key inside the artifact object
do_not_repeat: do not return an empty 'files' object — always include at minimum the two required files
do not put file content at the top level of the artifact — it must be under 'files'
do not repeat the same structure if the previous attempt already had the files missing at the same path

trigger: ArtifactAuditor found INVALID_RUNTIME_BASE — the runtime_base in package.json is not in available runtimes.
constraints: runtime_base must be exactly one of the values listed in the repair_hints instruction
Do not guess or invent a runtime_base — only use names from the known_context.available_runtimes list provided in the repair packet
do_not_repeat: do not keep the invalid runtime_base from the previous attempt
do not use a runtime_base with an @hive suffix — just the plain runtime name
do not use 'AI.chat' as a base for new config_only packages — use 'AI.common'

trigger: Plan compiler produced a plan with an unknown or misspelled action name.
constraints: Use only action names returned by get_admin_action_help or listed in the available actions
Action names are case-sensitive and use snake_case
Always verify the action name with get_admin_action_help before using it in a plan
do_not_repeat: do not use 'create_node' — the correct action is 'run_node'
do not use 'deploy_runtime' — the correct action is 'publish_runtime_package'
do not use 'update_route' — use 'delete_route' followed by 'add_route' instead
do not use 'apply_config' — the correct action is 'node_control_config_set'
